description: Two legal documents. Recto: legal document involving a loan of 60 dirhams received by ʿAmram b. Ṭoviyya in Tishrei 1453 (= 1141 CE), in Fusṭāṭ, to pay back to Maṣliaḥ b. Yosef in three installments of 20 dirhams each. Signed (crudely) by Mikhaʾel b. Shemarya ha-Kohen and Ṣedaqa b. Yosef ha-Kohen on the recto, and by Ṣedaqa alone on (the faṣl?) on verso. (Information from CUDL; see also Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
